articles.value: Let's Learn the Allied Color Pairs of Magic
articles.excerpt: If you're new to Magic, it can be hard to understand the color pairs. We're here to help by looking at the allied color pairs.
This list of the top 40 four-mana commanders is full of many of the best commanders out there. How many of these have you played against?

container.description: Popular decks and cards for Wilhelt, the Rotcleaver
container.title: Wilhelt, the Rotcleaver (Commander) - Optimized
